prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small green metal cube
  - obj_1: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_2: small purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_4: small purple metal sphere
  - obj_5: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_6: large green rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0041] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0042] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0043] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0044] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0045] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0046] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0047] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0048] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0049] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0050] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0051] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0052] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0053] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0054] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0055] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0056] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0057] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0058] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0059] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0060] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
